title: myosotis sylvatica var. alpina
intro: Myosotis sylvatica var. alpina, also known as alpine forget-me-not, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it a natural remedy for respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of alpine forget-me-not include its ability to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and bronchitis, as well as its use as a natural diuretic and antispasmodic. Alpine forget-me-not can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
